item.stardewcraft.candy.desc: A sweet treat loved by all.
item.stardewcraft.cheese_charcuterie.des: A hearty platter of cheese and crackers, served with butter dip.
A rich and creamy chocolate dessert with a smooth ganache center. Sells for a high price.
item.stardewcraft.fish_dumpling.desc: Thin and tender dough wrapped around sautéed fish.
item.stardewcraft.flower_cookie.desc: Smells as sweet as it tastes.
item.stardewcraft.gingerbread_man.desc: A delightful holiday treat decorated with playful gumdrop buttons.
item.stardewcraft.ice_cream_sundae.desc: Vanilla ice cream smothered in hot chocolate, topped with a cherry.
item.stardewcraft.mixed_berry_pie.desc: A delicious combination of sweet and sour flavors, unmatched in taste.
A delicate bread with dried nectarine specks, hinting at the sweetness within.
item.stardewcraft.pineapple_custard_crep: A rare tropical dessert with an indulgent flavor.
item.stardewcraft.ramen.desc: A popular dish from the Gotoro Empire.
item.stardewcraft.stuffed_persimmon.desc: It tempts both the palate and the senses.
item.stardewcraft.vegan_cone.desc: A dairy-free coconut milk ice cream alternative.
item.stardewcraft.prismatic_pop.desc: A rare and powerful ice cream infused with the essence of prismatic shards.
recipe.stardewcraft.chocolate_truffle_ba: Purchase from the Traveling Merchant during the Festival of Ice
recipe.stardewcraft.ice_cream_sundae.unl: Purchase at Pierre's during the Summer Luau
recipe.stardewcraft.prismatic_pop.unlock: Purchase at the Stardew Valley Fair (Year 2+)
stardewcraft.npc.morris.greeting: Welcome to JojaMart! I'm Morris, Joja's regional manager. We pride ourselves on providing the valley with quality goods at reasonable prices.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.first_greeting: Welcome to JojaMart! I'm Morris, Joja's regional manager. We're currently setting up a new membership program. Please check back soon for exclusive offers.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.weekend_greeting: Welcome to JojaMart! Enjoying your weekend? I'm Morris, Joja's regional manager. Our membership program is coming soon — stay tuned.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.first_membership: You've arrived at just the right time! Our Joja Membership program is now available, and I'd be delighted to walk you through the benefits. With a membership, we can take care of that old community center for you...
stardewcraft.npc.morris.weekend_membersh: A fine weekend to you! Our Joja Membership is available. Imagine what we could do with that old community center — a gleaming Joja Warehouse, for instance. Interested?
stardewcraft.npc.morris.first_cc_done: Welcome to JojaMart! Unfortunately, due to circumstances beyond our control, the Joja Membership offer is currently unavailable. We hope to resolve this soon.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.weekend_cc_done: Welcome to JojaMart! Enjoying your weekend? Apologies, but our Joja Membership is unavailable at this time. We'll notify you when things change.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.signup_confirm: Becoming a Joja Member means the community center will be converted into a Joja Warehouse. You won't be able to restore it, but Joja will provide alternative improvements to the town. Are you sure?#$q -1 -1 morris_signup_yes#$r -1 -1 morris_signup_yes#Yes, sign me up.#$r -1 -1 morris_dismiss#Not yet.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.signed_up: Excellent! Welcome to the Joja family! Come back tomorrow and we'll get started on community development projects. And remember — bring your wallet! Hehe.#$b#Now, let me call Mayor Lewis about that old community center...
stardewcraft.npc.morris.come_back_later: Come back tomorrow and we'll get started on those projects. And make sure to bring plenty of gold. Hehe.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.processing: We're currently processing your last community development order. Please return once the work is complete.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.cd_form_offer: $q -1 -1 morris_cd_yes#I've got the Joja Community Development Form ready for you. Care to take a look?#$r -1 -1 morris_cd_yes#Let's see it.#$r -1 -1 morris_dismiss#Not right now.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.cd_confirm: Excellent choice! Our crew will begin work tonight. It should be ready by tomorrow morning.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.no_more_cd: Ah, my favorite customer! Unfortunately, I have no more community development projects available at this time.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.second_player: Welcome to JojaMart! I see you share a farm with others. Unfortunately, memberships are tied to the farm owner. Please have them speak with me about Joja Membership.
